## Hindi SEO Pages (/hi/)

SEO-optimized content pages in Hindi targeting the Indian market. India has one of the world's largest and fastest-growing internet user bases (750M+ users), with a large and active used camera market on platforms like OLX and Facebook Marketplace.

- [शटर काउंट क्या है? — कैमरा शटर काउंट मुफ्त जांचें](https://shuttercount.app/hi/shutter-count-kya-hai/): Overview page explaining what shutter count is, why it matters, and how to check it in Hindi. Includes shutter lifespan table by camera class and comparison of checking methods. Targets शटर काउंट क्या है (what is shutter count).
- [शटर काउंट कैसे चेक करें — मुफ्त ऑनलाइन तरीका](https://shuttercount.app/hi/shutter-count-kaise-check-kare/): Step-by-step guide in Hindi for checking camera shutter count using ShutterCount, with a comparison table of methods (online tool vs ExifTool vs camera menu) and list of all supported file formats and brands. Targets शटर काउंट कैसे चेक करें (how to check shutter count).
- [सेकंड हैंड कैमरा खरीदने से पहले शटर काउंट जांचें](https://shuttercount.app/hi/second-hand-camera/): Buyer's guide for used cameras on Indian marketplaces (OLX, Facebook Marketplace). Includes condition grading table (A–D) by shutter usage percentage and a full used-camera buying checklist. Targets सेकंड हैंड कैमरा (second-hand camera).
- [कैमरा शटर की उम्र — ब्रांड के अनुसार पूरी जानकारी](https://shuttercount.app/hi/shutter-umra/): Full shutter lifespan reference tables for Canon, Nikon, Sony, and Fujifilm models in Hindi. Includes shutter failure symptoms and replacement cost guidance. Targets कैमरा शटर उम्र (camera shutter lifespan).
- [EXIF से शटर काउंट मुफ्त जांचें — ऑनलाइन टूल](https://shuttercount.app/hi/exif-shutter-free/): Explains how EXIF MakerNote metadata stores shutter count per brand, how ShutterCount reads it locally without uploading files, and how to use ExifTool from the command line. Targets EXIF शटर काउंट (EXIF shutter count).

Targets cek shutter count.

Targets batas shutter kamera.
- [Umur Shutter Kamera — Berapa Lama Rana Kamera Bertahan?](https://shuttercount.app/id/umur-shutter-kamera/): Explains factors affecting shutter lifespan (camera class, burst mode, environment, electronic shutter), includes shutter failure symptom checklist, and estimated shutter replacement costs in Indonesian Rupiah. Targets umur shutter kamera.
- [Beli Kamera Bekas — Cek Shutter Count Sebelum Membeli](https://shuttercount.app/id/beli-kamera-bekas/): Buyer's guide for used cameras on Indonesian marketplaces (OLX, Tokopedia, Shopee, Facebook Marketplace). Includes a 5-step verification checklist, A–E condition grading table by shutter usage percentage, and tips for negotiating price. Targets beli kamera bekas.

Targets EXIF shutter count miễn phí (free EXIF shutter count).

Canon, Nikon and Sony cameras are popular in Myanmar, and used-camera markets are active on Facebook Marketplace and local shops.

Targets ရှတ်တာကောင့် စစ်ဆေးနည်း (how to check shutter count).
- [ကင်မရာ ရှတ်တာ အများဆုံး ကောင့် — Canon, Nikon, Sony, Fujifilm ဇယား](https://shuttercount.app/my/shutter-amarzone/): Reference tables of maximum rated shutter actuations for popular Canon, Nikon and Sony camera models, with guidance on how to interpret remaining lifespan as a percentage of the manufacturer rating. Targets ရှတ်တာ အများဆုံး ကောင့် (maximum shutter count).
- [ကင်မရာ ရှတ်တာ သက်တမ်း — မည်မျှ ကြာနိုင်သလဲ](https://shuttercount.app/my/shutter-thetame/): Explains factors affecting shutter lifespan (camera class, burst mode, electronic shutter, environment), includes shutter failure symptom checklist, and provides estimated replacement cost guidance. Targets ကင်မရာ ရှတ်တာ သက်တမ်း (camera shutter lifespan).
- [အသုံးပြုပြီး ကင်မရာ ဝယ်ယူနည်း — ရှတ်တာကောင့် အရင်စစ်ဆေးပါ](https://shuttercount.app/my/thonepyupi-kaymara/): Buyer's guide for second-hand cameras in Myanmar (Facebook Marketplace, local camera shops). Includes A–E condition grading table by shutter count percentage, 5-step inspection checklist, and tips for negotiating price. Targets အသုံးပြုပြီး ကင်မရာ (used/second-hand camera).

## Thai SEO Pages (/th/)

SEO-optimized content pages in Thai (ภาษาไทย) targeting Thailand — a country of 60 million native speakers with a significant and active photography community. Thailand (particularly Bangkok) is a major camera hub in Southeast Asia, with thriving used-camera markets on platforms like Kaidee, Facebook Marketplace, and specialist camera shops. Canon, Nikon, Sony and Fujifilm are the dominant brands.

- [Shutter Count คืออะไร — ตรวจสอบจำนวนชัตเตอร์กล้องออนไลน์ฟรี](https://shuttercount.app/th/shutter-count/): Overview page explaining what shutter count (จำนวนชัตเตอร์) is, why it matters for camera valuation and used-camera purchases, and how to check it for free with ShutterCount. Includes a shutter lifespan table by camera class (entry-level to professional) and step-by-step instructions. Targets "shutter count คืออะไร" (what is shutter count).
- [วิธีตรวจสอบ Shutter Count กล้อง — ออนไลน์ฟรี ไม่ต้องติดตั้งโปรแกรม](https://shuttercount.app/th/truat-shutter-count/): Step-by-step guide for checking camera shutter count using ShutterCount, with a full table of supported brands and file formats (Canon CR3/CR2, Nikon NEF, Sony ARW, Fujifilm RAF, Olympus ORF, Panasonic RW2, JPEG) and comparison of methods (online tool vs ExifTool vs camera menu). Targets "ตรวจสอบ shutter count" (check shutter count).
- [กล้องมือสอง — เช็ค Shutter Count ก่อนซื้อ](https://shuttercount.app/th/klong-meu-song/): Buyer's guide for second-hand cameras in Thailand (Kaidee, Facebook Marketplace, local camera shops). Includes condition grading table by shutter count percentage, inspection checklist, and popular used-camera models in the Thai market. Targets "กล้องมือสอง shutter count" (used camera shutter count).
- [จำนวนชัตเตอร์สูงสุด — อายุการใช้งานกล้องแต่ละรุ่น](https://shuttercount.app/th/shutter-count-sungsut/): Reference tables of maximum rated shutter actuations for popular Canon, Nikon, Sony and Fujifilm camera models, with guidance on interpreting remaining lifespan. Targets "จำนวนชัตเตอร์สูงสุด" (maximum shutter count) and "อายุชัตเตอร์กล้อง" (camera shutter lifespan).
- [เช็ค Shutter Count จาก EXIF ฟรี — ไม่ต้องส่งไฟล์](https://shuttercount.app/th/exif-shutter-free/): Explains how EXIF MakerNote data stores shutter count, lists all supported file formats (JPEG, CR3, NEF, ARW, RAF, ORF, RW2, DNG), and highlights ShutterCount's privacy-first approach (no server upload, 100% in-browser). Targets "shutter count ฟรี" and "exif shutter count ฟรี" (free EXIF shutter count).

## Punjabi SEO Pages (/pa/)

SEO-optimized content pages in Punjabi (ਪੰਜਾਬੀ) targeting the Punjabi-speaking market — the 9th most spoken language globally (~125 million speakers) across Punjab (India), Pakistan, and diaspora communities in the UK, Canada, and the USA. Punjabi-speaking audiences are highly active in photography, particularly wedding photography, making camera shutter count a relevant search topic. All pages are written in Gurmukhi script with romanized URL slugs.

- [ਕੈਮਰਾ ਸ਼ਟਰ ਕਾਊਂਟ ਕੀ ਹੈ? — ਮੁਫ਼ਤ ਔਨਲਾਈਨ ਜਾਂਚ](https://shuttercount.app/pa/shutter-count-ki-hai/): Overview page explaining what shutter count (ਸ਼ਟਰ ਕਾਊਂਟ) is, why it matters for used-camera evaluation, and how to check it for free with ShutterCount. Includes shutter lifespan table by camera class (entry-level to professional) and comparison of checking methods. Targets ਸ਼ਟਰ ਕਾਊਂਟ ਕੀ ਹੈ (what is shutter count).
- [ਕੈਮਰਾ ਸ਼ਟਰ ਕਾਊਂਟ ਕਿਵੇਂ ਚੈੱਕ ਕਰੀਏ — ਮੁਫ਼ਤ ਔਨਲਾਈਨ](https://shuttercount.app/pa/shutter-count-kiven-check-kare/): Step-by-step guide for checking camera shutter count using ShutterCount, with full table of supported brands and file formats (Canon CR3/CR2, Nikon NEF, Sony ARW, Fujifilm RAF, Olympus ORF, Panasonic RW2, JPEG) and comparison of methods (online tool vs ExifTool vs camera menu). Targets ਸ਼ਟਰ ਕਾਊਂਟ ਕਿਵੇਂ ਚੈੱਕ ਕਰੀਏ (how to check shutter count).
- [ਪੁਰਾਣਾ ਕੈਮਰਾ ਖਰੀਦਣ ਤੋਂ ਪਹਿਲਾਂ ਸ਼ਟਰ ਕਾਊਂਟ ਜ਼ਰੂਰ ਜਾਂਚੋ](https://shuttercount.app/pa/purana-camera-khareedna/): Buyer's guide for used cameras on Indian and Pakistani marketplaces (OLX, Facebook Marketplace, local camera shops). Includes A–D condition grading table by shutter count percentage, used-camera inspection checklist, and reference table of maximum shutter counts for popular Canon, Nikon, Sony, and Fujifilm models. Targets ਪੁਰਾਣਾ ਕੈਮਰਾ ਖਰੀਦਣਾ (buying used camera).
- [ਕੈਮਰਾ ਸ਼ਟਰ ਦੀ ਉਮਰ — ਬ੍ਰਾਂਡ ਅਨੁਸਾਰ ਪੂਰੀ ਜਾਣਕਾਰੀ](https://shuttercount.app/pa/shutter-di-umar/): Full shutter lifespan reference tables for Canon, Nikon, Sony, and Fujifilm camera models in Punjabi. Includes shutter failure symptom list and estimated replacement costs in Indian Rupees. Targets ਕੈਮਰਾ ਸ਼ਟਰ ਦੀ ਉਮਰ (camera shutter lifespan).
- [EXIF ਤੋਂ ਸ਼ਟਰ ਕਾਊਂਟ ਮੁਫ਼ਤ ਜਾਂਚੋ — ਔਨਲਾਈਨ ਟੂਲ](https://shuttercount.app/pa/exif-shutter-muft/): Explains how EXIF MakerNote metadata stores shutter count per brand, how ShutterCount reads it locally without uploading files, and includes ExifTool command-line examples for Nikon, Sony, and Canon. Targets EXIF ਸ਼ਟਰ ਕਾਊਂਟ (EXIF shutter count).
## Romanian SEO Pages (/ro/)

SEO-optimized content pages in Romanian (română) targeting Romania — a country of 19 million native speakers and a growing EU photography market. Romania has an active used-camera market on platforms like OLX and Facebook Marketplace, with Canon, Nikon, and Sony being the dominant brands among enthusiast and semi-professional photographers.

- [Contor declanșări — Verifică numărul de declanșări online](https://shuttercount.app/ro/contor-declansari/): Overview page explaining what shutter count (contor de declanșări) is, why it matters for camera valuation and used-camera purchases, and how to check it for free with ShutterCount. Includes step-by-step instructions and a list of supported camera brands and formats. Targets "contor declanșări" (shutter counter).
- [Verificare declanșări aparat foto — Gratuit online](https://shuttercount.app/ro/verificare-declansari/): Step-by-step guide for checking camera shutter actuations using ShutterCount, with guidance on using original RAW/JPEG files (not social media copies), shutter lifespan benchmarks by camera class, and a warning about social media EXIF stripping. Targets "verificare declanșări" (shutter count verification).
- [Declanșări maxime pe model — Tabel complet Canon, Nikon, Sony](https://shuttercount.app/ro/declansari-maxime/): Reference tables of maximum rated shutter actuations for popular Canon, Nikon, Sony and Fujifilm camera models, with guidance on interpreting remaining lifespan as a percentage of the manufacturer rating. Targets "declanșări maxime" (maximum shutter actuations).
- [EXIF declanșări gratuit — Citește datele EXIF online](https://shuttercount.app/ro/exif-declansari-gratuit/): Explains how EXIF MakerNote data stores shutter count, lists all supported file formats (JPEG, CR3, NEF, ARW, RAF, ORF, RW2), and highlights ShutterCount's privacy-first approach (no server upload, 100% in-browser). Targets "EXIF declanșări gratuit" (free EXIF shutter count).
- [Durata de viață a obturatorului — Câte declanșări rezistă un aparat foto?](https://shuttercount.app/ro/durata-viata-obturator/): Explains shutter lifespan certification, provides lifespan ranges by camera class (entry to professional), includes a remaining-lifespan formula with a worked example, and covers mechanical vs electronic shutter impact on wear. Targets "durata de viață obturator" (shutter lifespan).

## Greek SEO Pages (/el/)

SEO-optimized content pages in Greek (Ελληνικά) targeting Greece — a country of 11 million native speakers and a significant EU photography market with high per-capita camera ownership. Greece's thriving tourism industry, landscape photography tradition, and active used-camera market on platforms like Car.gr and Facebook Marketplace make shutter count a highly relevant search topic. All pages are written in Greek (modern Monotonic script) with romanized (Greeklish transliteration) URL slugs.

- [Μετρητής Κλείστρου — Δωρεάν Online Έλεγχος](https://shuttercount.app/el/metritis-klistrou/): Overview page explaining what the shutter counter (μετρητής κλείστρου) is, why it matters, and how to read it for free with ShutterCount. Covers supported brands (Canon, Nikon, Sony, Fujifilm), step-by-step instructions, and privacy guarantee (no file upload). Targets "μετρητής κλείστρου" (shutter counter).
- [Έλεγχος Κλείστρου Φωτογραφικής Μηχανής — Δωρεάν Online](https://shuttercount.app/el/elegchos-klistrou/): Step-by-step guide for checking camera shutter count using ShutterCount, including warning about social media EXIF stripping, shutter lifespan thresholds by camera class (entry to professional), and comparison of checking methods (ShutterCount vs ExifTool vs camera menu). Targets "έλεγχος κλείστρου" (shutter check).
- [Μέγιστες Λήψεις Κλείστρου ανά Μοντέλο Μηχανής](https://shuttercount.app/el/maximes-lipseis/): Reference table of maximum rated shutter actuations for popular Canon, Nikon, Sony and Fujifilm camera models, with explanation of what shutter limits mean and a practical buying guideline (under 50% = excellent, over 75% = caution). Targets "μέγιστες λήψεις" (maximum shutter actuations).
- [Διάρκεια Ζωής Κλείστρου — Πόσες Λήψεις Αντέχει η Μηχανή σας;](https://shuttercount.app/el/diarkeia-zois-klistrou/): Covers shutter lifespan concept, factors affecting longevity (burst mode, temperature, maintenance), remaining-lifespan calculation formula with worked example, and signs of shutter failure. Notes that electronic shutter does not increment the mechanical counter. Targets "διάρκεια ζωής κλείστρου" (shutter lifespan).
- [EXIF Κλείστρου Δωρεάν — Διάβασε τον Αριθμό Λήψεων από RAW](https://shuttercount.app/el/exif-klistrou-dorean/): Explains where shutter count is stored in EXIF MakerNote data per manufacturer, lists all supported RAW formats (CR3, CR2, NEF, ARW, RAF, ORF, RW2, DNG, JPEG), explains why social media photos lose EXIF data, and describes ShutterCount's fully client-side privacy-first approach. Targets "EXIF κλείστρου δωρεάν" (free EXIF shutter data).

## Bengali SEO Pages (/bn/)

SEO-optimized content pages in Bengali (বাংলা) targeting the Bengali-speaking market — the 7th most spoken language globally with 230+ million native speakers across Bangladesh (170M) and West Bengal, India (100M). Bangladesh has a rapidly growing internet user base (120M+ users) with an active used-camera market on Facebook Marketplace and local camera shops in Dhaka, Chittagong and beyond. Canon, Nikon and Sony are the dominant brands. All pages are written in Bengali (Bangla script) with romanized URL slugs.

- [শাটার কাউন্ট কী? — ক্যামেরা শাটার কাউন্ট বিনামূল্যে চেক করুন](https://shuttercount.app/bn/shutter-count-ki/): Overview page explaining what shutter count (শাটার কাউন্ট) is, why it matters for used-camera evaluation, and how to check it for free with ShutterCount. Includes shutter lifespan table by camera class (entry-level to professional), explanation of electronic vs mechanical shutter, and comparison of checking methods. Targets শাটার কাউন্ট কী (what is shutter count).
- [শাটার কাউন্ট চেক করুন — বিনামূল্যে অনলাইনে](https://shuttercount.app/bn/shutter-count-check/): Step-by-step guide for checking camera shutter count using ShutterCount, with warning about social media EXIF stripping, full table of supported brands and file formats (Canon CR3/CR2, Nikon NEF, Sony ARW, Fujifilm RAF, Olympus ORF, Panasonic RW2, JPEG), and comparison table of checking methods (ShutterCount vs ExifTool vs camera menu vs service centre). Targets শাটার কাউন্ট চেক (how to check shutter count).
- [পুরনো ক্যামেরা কেনার আগে শাটার কাউন্ট চেক করুন](https://shuttercount.app/bn/purono-camera-kena/): Buyer's guide for second-hand cameras in Bangladesh and India (Facebook Marketplace, OLX, local shops). Includes A–D condition grading table by shutter count percentage, used-camera inspection checklist (8 items), and reference table of maximum shutter counts for popular Canon, Nikon, Sony and Fujifilm models. Targets পুরনো ক্যামেরা কেনা (buying used camera).
- [ক্যামেরা শাটারের আয়ু — ব্র্যান্ড অনুযায়ী সম্পূর্ণ তথ্য](https://shuttercount.app/bn/shutter-ayu/): Full shutter lifespan reference tables for Canon, Nikon, Sony and Fujifilm camera models in Bengali. Includes shutter failure symptom list and a practical remaining-lifespan formula. Targets ক্যামেরা শাটার আয়ু (camera shutter lifespan).
- [EXIF থেকে শাটার কাউন্ট বিনামূল্যে চেক করুন — অনলাইন টুল](https://shuttercount.app/bn/exif-shutter-free/): Explains where shutter count is stored in EXIF MakerNote data per manufacturer (Canon CR3/CR2, Nikon NEF, Sony ARW, Fujifilm RAF, Olympus ORF, Panasonic RW2), includes ExifTool command-line examples, explains why social media photos lose EXIF data, and describes ShutterCount's fully client-side privacy-first approach. Targets EXIF শাটার কাউন্ট (EXIF shutter count).

## Uzbek SEO Pages (/uz/)

SEO-optimized content pages in Uzbek (O'zbek tili) targeting Uzbekistan — a country of 35M+ speakers and a rapidly growing digital economy in Central Asia. Uzbekistan's emerging middle class is actively purchasing cameras (Canon, Nikon, Sony and Fujifilm are popular brands), and used-camera markets are active on platforms such as OLX.uz, Olx and local camera shops in Tashkent, Samarkand and Bukhara. All pages are written in standard Uzbek Latin script (the official script since 1993) with romanized URL slugs.

- [Shutter Count Nima? Kamera Zatvori Soni Haqida](https://shuttercount.app/uz/shutter-count-nima/): Overview page explaining what shutter count (zatvor soni) is, why it matters for used-camera evaluation, and how to check it for free with ShutterCount. Includes shutter lifespan table by camera class (entry-level to professional), analogy with car mileage, explanation of mechanical vs electronic shutter impact on counter, and four-step guide for checking via RAW file. Targets "shutter count nima" (what is shutter count).
- [Kamera Shutter Count Qanday Tekshiriladi — Canon, Nikon, Sony](https://shuttercount.app/uz/shutter-count-tekshirish/): Step-by-step guide (5 steps) for checking camera shutter count using ShutterCount, with a visual grid of supported RAW file formats (Canon CR3/CR2, Nikon NEF, Sony ARW, Fujifilm RAF, Olympus ORF, Panasonic RW2, Adobe DNG, JPEG), brand-specific instructions for Canon, Nikon, Sony and Fujifilm, and FAQ covering no-detection causes and privacy. Targets "shutter count tekshirish" (check shutter count) and "kamera shutter count qanday tekshiriladi" (how to check camera shutter count).
- [Ishlatilgan Kamera Sotib Olish — Shutter Count Tekshirish Qo'llanmasi](https://shuttercount.app/uz/ishlatilgan-kamera-sotib-olish/): Buyer's guide for second-hand cameras with an A–E condition grading table by shutter count percentage, 8-item inspection checklist (shutter count, sensor dust, LCD/EVF, buttons, battery, mount, coatings, physical damage), pricing guidance by condition band, red-flag warnings, and hidden cost breakdown. Targets "ishlatilgan kamera sotib olish" (buying used camera) and "b/u kamera" (second-hand camera).
- [Kamera Shutter Count Chegarasi — Canon, Nikon, Sony, Fujifilm](https://shuttercount.app/uz/shutter-count-chegarasi/): Reference tables of maximum rated shutter actuations for popular Canon (EOS R1 through RP, plus DSLR), Nikon (Z and D series), Sony (Alpha series) and Fujifilm (X and GFX series) camera models, with camera-class summary table and guidance on what to do when approaching or exceeding the rated limit. Targets "shutter count chegarasi" (shutter count limit) and "zatvor soni limiti" (shutter actuation limit).
- [Mexanik va Elektron Zatvor Farqi — Shutter Count ta'siri](https://shuttercount.app/uz/mexanik-elektron-zatvor/): Explains the three shutter types (mechanical, EFCS, fully electronic / silent), which increment the shutter count and which do not, with a side-by-side comparison card (pros/cons) and a feature matrix table covering rolling shutter risk, flash sync, burst speed, and mechanical wear. Includes guidance on global shutter technology (Sony A9 III) and practical tips on which mode to use for different genres (portrait, sport, wedding). Targets "mexanik va elektron zatvor" (mechanical and electronic shutter) and "zatvor farqi" (shutter difference).

## Optional

- [llms-full.txt](https://shuttercount.app/llms-full.txt): Extended version with full page descriptions and FAQ content for each camera model page.
